{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220801092BBEA0E0028EF17E4FB0"}"},"total":83},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7434216273905894168","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本也还可以，但是发展太快了，角色僵硬，导致代入感不是太强，没有慢下来多描写细节，上一本写的非常好，剧情细节都到位，但是打磨剧情导致写的太慢，被河蟹了，所有这一本节奏加快了，作者是不是想一鼓作气写完结，作者加油，这本小说设定很好，也还可以看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730924757,"group_id":"7427544506716671038","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4o1Yb9kcjhr7k/D5ZOC4VQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/66cb597f5bb94ed8bdb68a7cf344af1b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708076&x-signature=bV%2BmVqvCmz%2B2TsTYHZvI%2FhG26TM%3D","user_id":"540557048546072","user_name":"天寒如水"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"540557048546072","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1675416953,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7427544506716671038","book_info":{"abstract":"【利己主义+杀伐果断+无女主+独狼+卡牌+无限流】
周曜，一觉醒来，穿越到游戏【原卡之门】当中，成为一位连名字不配拥有的路人NPC。
这个世界中，存在着各种能带来奇异力量的原卡，光怪陆离的游戏副本，充满着无限可能。
原卡能不断的进阶与融合，获得各种不同奇异且强大的效果。
【火球术】→【业火焚天】
【火球术】+【尸体操控】=【尸爆术】
【火球术】+【魅惑人类】=【欲火焚身】
同时各个区域中，散落着最为原始与强大的十张原初之卡与十张原罪之卡。
集齐这二十张神明之卡，便能化身成神。
摆在周曜面前最大问题，是废物到极点的属性与天赋，甚至连最基础的原卡都无法使用。
邪道流，似乎是他目前唯一的选择。
这条道路，他将注定孤单，只有杀戮与死亡陪伴。
至于成为救世主，或是灭世者之类的......
全都与他无关。
周曜只想解锁这个游戏的隐藏结局，完成最高难度的挑战，踏足那未知的领域。
现在，游戏开始了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o004fb0ad9cce83e6f185fe2ae4d5b554~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"灰白色的雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7427544506716671038","book_name":"身为穿越者，我选择天煞孤星","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":874,"name":"卡牌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=874&name=卡牌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7427544688879485502","read_count":"430","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"297873"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"143","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,无限流,无女主,升级流,卡牌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/89acc3bc467e268252fc6c21451b2ef7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321669&x-signature=2kNZAmujBwwu2mDHuUT6HTxHeTM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3545272088789102","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"70"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220801092BBEA0E0028EF17E4FB0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8067,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8676,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":5631},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7450055126009299736","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很强大，谨慎的主角，至少在前期还没有完成发育的时候非常谨慎（很少看见打boss叠几十个法阵或技能卡这种类似东西的）。后面慢慢来说就是主角根据剧情发育后成长起来的爽文了，可以说书中的许多设定很有意思，就是感觉书中写的集齐20章神卡的时间只有一个月左右的时间有些太短了，感觉就像看着别人速通一样，但是看着主角冷漠地击杀他人不哔哔赖赖的真的好。
 不谈其他的，主要的观感可以，其他可能战力失衡什么的，有些可能确实是主角提升的太快了，而且感觉这个等级有些少了。其他就不说了
